200.description: A list of provider configurations for the organization.

object.description: Indicates this is a list response.
Distinguishes the data integration configuration object.

id.description: The unique identifier of the data integration.

slug.description: The slug identifier of the provider (e.g., `github`, `slack`, `notion`).

name.description: The display name of the data integration.

enabled.description: Whether the integration is enabled for this organization. Reflects the organization override when one exists, otherwise the provider default.

scopes.description: The OAuth scopes in effect for this organization. Reflects the organization override when one is set, otherwise the provider scopes, or `null` when none are configured.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the configuration was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the configuration was last updated.

credentials_type.description: The credentials type for this integration (e.g., `shared`, `custom`, or `organization`).

has_credentials.description: Whether the organization has supplied OAuth credentials for this integration.

client_id.description: The OAuth client ID supplied by the organization, or `null` when none is configured.

client_secret_last_four.description: The last four characters of the organization-supplied OAuth client secret, or `null` when none is configured.

redirect_uri.description: The redirect URI to register with the provider when configuring the organization-managed OAuth application.

credentials.description: Organization-managed OAuth credential configuration. Present only for integrations whose credentials are supplied by the organization; absent otherwise.
credentials.title: DataIntegrationCredentials

data.description: A list of data integration configurations for the organization.

401.description: The request is missing a valid API key.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
